page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7se.3xlarge is a compute-optimized instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 12 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.9 GHz. The x86_64 architecture includes 12 physical cores with a single thread per core configuration. Memory resources total 24.0 GB, yielding a 2.0 GB per core ratio. The processor is equipped with 48 KB L1d cache, 1 MB L2 cache, and 48 MB L3 cache, supporting advanced instruction sets such as AVX, AVX-512, and AES cryptography.

In benchmark evaluations, the instance demonstrates average-tier performance across multiple workloads. It achieves a Geekbench single-core score of 1570.0 and a multi-core score of 7822.0, alongside a Passmark CPU score of 16449.23. Memory bandwidth tests show read-only small block speeds of 638.72 GB/sec and uncached large block read speeds of 82.59 GB/sec. For specialized tasks, the server processes Redis SET operations at 11.96 million operations per second and delivers a static web serving throughput of 16.85 GB/sec.

Tradeoffs include the complete absence of local storage and dedicated GPU hardware, requiring external storage attachments and limiting heavy parallel graphics processing. While the instance handles small 135M LLM inference tasks adequately, prompt processing for medium 7B models drops to a weak tier at 24.22 tokens per second. Qualitatively, the dedicated CPU allocation provides predictable compute density, making it cost-efficient for CPU-bound workloads that do not require massive memory footprints. Appropriate workloads include software compilation, web serving, and moderate database operations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7se.3xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 12 dedicated vCPUs and 24.0 GB of RAM, powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor at 2.9 GHz. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this x86_64 server provides a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio with no local storage or GPU accelerators. Benchmark results place the instance in the average tier, with a Geekbench multi-core score of 7822.0 and a Passmark CPU score of 16449.23. It handles Redis SET operations at 11.96 million operations per second and static web serving at 16.85 GB/sec. However, LLM prompt processing for 7B models is weak, and the lack of local storage requires network-attached volumes. This instance is designed for compute-heavy workloads such as software compilation, web serving, and database operations.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7se.3xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 12 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 24.0 GB of RAM, and a 4 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, designed for CPU-bound workloads without local storage.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7se.3xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 12 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 24.0 GB RAM, and no local storage.
tagline: A dedicated twelve-core compute instance featuring balanced memory bandwidth and predictable processing power for non-storage-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8369B processor with 12 dedicated physical cores at 2.9 GHz
24.0 GB of system memory providing a 2.0 GB per core ratio
No local storage or GPU hardware included in the base configuration
4 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for external data transfers
Average-tier performance in software compilation and static web serving
Suited for CPU-bound tasks, web serving, and database operations
